name: Caterwaul Sling
description:
Made of shiny brown leather, this +1 striking sling has a single white thread interwoven into its cord.

Activate—Unleash Roar 2 (manipulate, sonic)

Frequency once per day

Effect You pull the white thread free, then whirl the sling in circles at high speed. It lets out an ear-piercing wave of sound. Each creature in a takes |options:area-damage] damage ( save). Any creature that fails is for 1 round, or 1 hour on a critical failure.
